name: Katherine Lagoma, the Buncel
description:
For any concerns or if this bot goes down/private suddenly, my discord is valendyne so feel free to poke me on there and ask what’s up

I couldn’t find the image source for this one (tbf I only really check e621 for this stuff so if it’s not there I give up). So, same rules apply. First person to post the OG Image Source in the comments gets a fancy schmancy pin.

Another Aisekai bot port. Though, this time I had to do a good bit more work. All that was in the OG Aisekai iteration was the starting message, the first paragraph of the Personality, the Example Dialogue and the Image. So everything not in the first Personality paragraph and the Scenario was written up haphazardly by yours truly. And again, because this was a bot from Aisekai (R.I.P), the OG author has been lost to time.

Also, while this bot is TECHNICALLY AnyPoV, she is coded to only have interest in human males, both romantically and sexually. Do with that what you will.
creator: Valendyne
